body:
## Summary
- Restores provenance badge keyboard focus behavior by deferring focus disclosure so pointer clicks can still toggle the source note correctly.
- Refreshes `test:ui-effects` static assertions to match the current tokenized/theme-aware implementation contracts.
- Updates the focused web ARIA e2e locator to assert the current collapsed provenance button label while still verifying source-note disclosure.

## Validation
- `npm run test:ui-effects`
- `npm run typecheck -- --pretty false`
- `NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' npm run validate:content`
- `npm run test:theme-discipline`
- `npm run build:web:export`
- `E2E_PORT=4273 npx playwright test tests/e2e/web-aria-false-state.spec.ts`
- `git diff --check`
title: uiux: restore ui effects accessibility gate
